Feedback.title: Send Feedback
Feedback.description: Help us improve LinguaBridge AI. Share your thoughts or report issues.

Dashboard.unlockUnlimited: Unlock unlimited translations and voice features.

hero.title: Break Language Barriers Instantly
hero.subtitle: Chat seamlessly with anyone, anywhere. Real-time AI translation for text and voice messages in over 50 languages.

features.title: Communication Without Limits
features.description: Experience the future of global communication with our cutting-edge AI technology.

chat.title: Real-time Chat
chat.description: Instant messaging with ultra-low latency. Messages are translated as they arrive.

voice.title: Voice Translation
voice.description: Speak naturally. We transcribe, translate, and synthesize your voice into the target language.

autoDetect.title: Auto-Detection
autoDetect.description: Our AI automatically detects the language you're speaking or typing.

globalConnect.title: Global Connect
globalConnect.description: Find and connect with users worldwide without worrying about language differences.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Powered by Redis and Socket.io for instant message delivery and updates.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your conversations are private and secure. We prioritize your data privacy.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started with LinguaBridge AI in three simple steps.

1.title: Create an Account
1.description: Sign up for free using your email. It takes less than a minute.

2.title: Set Your Language
2.description: Choose your native language. We support over 50 languages for seamless translation.

3.title: Start Chatting
3.description: Find users and start chatting. You type in your language, they read in theirs.

about.title: Why LinguaBridge AI?
about.description: LinguaBridge AI exists to dismantle language barriers. In an increasingly connected world, language should not be a wall but a bridge. Our platform empowers you to communicate effortlessly with anyone, anywhere, regardless of their native tongue. Perfect for travelers, international business, and cross-cultural friendships.

cta.title: Ready to start conversing?
cta.subtitle: Join LinguaBridge AI today and connect with the world.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Start chatting immediately.
